rows.label: qev025203_MSG0034
rows.name:
The people in the provisional government
will surely understand. Please hurry
up and get this sorted out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0001
rows.name:
You! Well? Did you get
it sorted out properly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ehhh?! You're telling me to swallow
my physiological discomfort just
because society accepts them...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0003
rows.name:
You've got to be joking! Doesn't
that basically mean "kill your
emotions and cooperate with politics"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0004
rows.name:
If there really were a lot of people out there
who genuinely wanted to be friends with the
Ma-non, I could at least accept it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0005
rows.name:
If that's not the case, I absolutely
refuse to be the only one suffering![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0006
rows.name:
Why don't you try asking the people
around the city? I'm sure they're
just as bothered by them as I am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0007
rows.name:
Why don't you try asking the
people around the city?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0008
rows.name:
If it turns out that everyone
truly believes we should get
along with the Ma-non, then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll give it some thought. It
wouldn't be fair for me to be
the only one acting selfishly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Hmph. I'm sure everyone will unanimously
say they're a nuisance, anyway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0011
rows.name:
Well, how was it? The people in the city
said they couldn't get along with those
reptile-like people after all, didn't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_JNK0010
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev025203_SEL0011
rows.name:
Explain that many people
held favorable opinions.

rows.label: qev025203_JNK0020
rows.name: Rebuke

rows.label: qev025203_SEL0021
rows.name:
Chastise Alesa for speaking
ill of Earth's friends.

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0012
rows.name:
What...? That many people are
being helped by the Ma-non...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0013
rows.name: How can you say they're our friends?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Eh? You heard stories about
many people being helped by them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0015
rows.name:
Some even had their
lives saved by them...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0016
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0017
rows.name:
To reject such good people... just
because their appearance physiologically
bothers me a little...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0018
rows.name:
That's absolutely wrong of me. Even I
have at least that much common sense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0019
rows.name: ...Alright, I get it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0020
rows.name:
From a financial standpoint, the shop
probably wouldn't survive without the
Ma-non at this point, anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0021
rows.name:
My retail smile might still be a bit stiff,
but I won't do anything like refuse Ma-non
customers from entering my shop anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025203_MSG0022
rows.name:
Who knows, they might end up being
my best customers! I'll put in my
own effort to make it work![ST:wait ]
